title: JmapChatClient::new accepts non-http/https base URL schemes
description: new() validates path, query, fragment but not URL scheme. 'ftp://host' and 'file:///etc/passwd' pass construction successfully. The error only surfaces at HTTP request time as a generic ClientError::Http with no indication the base URL scheme is wrong. Inconsistent with connect_ws which explicitly validates ws:// or wss://. Should check scheme is http or https in new().
close_reason: Added scheme validation in new(); added new_rejects_non_http_scheme and new_accepts_http_base_url tests
